## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and its motivation.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant .NET build or Windows source test
- [ ] Documentation updated in both README languages when behavior changed

## Security And Privacy

- [ ] No credentials, browser profiles, session data, diagnostics, private prompts, or personal paths are included.
- [ ] The change preserves loopback-only defaults or documents a reviewed alternative.
- [ ] Any new file, URL, tool, or browser boundary has been considered for abuse and data exposure.
